_about: Event presets for TUO GUI. Selecting a preset applies the keys under
'settings'; anything not listed is left alone, so personal fields
(My Deck, inventory file, threads) are never touched.
An empty string "" clears that field on apply.
Values use plain tuo terms: mode pvp/pvp-defense/gw/gw-defense/brawl/
(The GUI's display labels are also accepted.)
Easiest way to make one: set up the form in the app and click 'Save as...'.
Presets marked draft:true are best guesses — corrections welcome!
Previous_Brawl   = gauntlet of DEFENCE decks players used in a brawl (by Isilrond) — sim your attack deck against it.
Previous_Brawl_A = gauntlet of ATTACK decks players used in a brawl (by Isilrond) — sim your defence deck against it.
Tip: don't sim a whole gauntlet unless you have a billion threads and time to waste — 10 to 15 decks is plenty.

Arena Attack.description: Optimize your attack deck against defence decks seen in brawls (Previous_Brawl gauntlet by Isilrond). Tip: 10-15 decks is plenty — copy a subset into a custom gauntlet rather than simming the whole thing.

Arena Defence.description: Optimize your defence deck against attack decks seen in brawls (Previous_Brawl_A gauntlet by Isilrond). Tip: 10-15 decks is plenty.

Brawl Attack.description: DRAFT — verify with top players. Maximize brawl score with your attack deck vs the defence-deck gauntlet. Brawl mode plays as surge (enemy first).

Brawl Defence.description: DRAFT — verify with top players. Minimize the enemy's brawl score with your defence deck vs the attack-deck gauntlet.

Guild Brawl Attack.description: DRAFT — verify with top players (scoring may differ from regular brawl). Attack deck vs defence gauntlet.

Guild Brawl Defence.description: DRAFT — verify with top players (scoring may differ from regular brawl). Defence deck vs attack gauntlet.

Mission.description: DRAFT. Only the attack deck is simmed. Type the mission name into Enemy Deck (cleared on apply to remind you).

Raid.description: DRAFT. Only the attack deck is simmed; raid mode maximizes raid score. Type the raid name into Enemy Deck (cleared on apply to remind you).

War Attack.description: DRAFT — verify with top players. GW scoring with your attack deck. Remember to set: enemy gauntlet, siege forts (yours), defence forts (enemy's), and the war effects (ye/ee) for both sides — these change every war, so the preset doesn't touch them.

War Defence.description: DRAFT — verify with top players. Minimize the enemy's GW score with your defence deck. Remember to set: enemy gauntlet, forts and war effects for both sides — these change every war, so the preset doesn't touch them.
